params.name: CRISPR
params.description:
On Dec 15, 2011 AD, the study of CRISPR was officially published.
CRISPR is one of three techniques for gene editing. It is derived from the natural immune system of prokaryotes, and it is effective, convenient, and inexpensive, and it can precisely edit the genes of plants, animals, and microorganisms. This technology's emergence has had a transformative impact on life science research, greatly assisting in the development of cancer treatments and remedies for genetic illnesses, as well as m …
